evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all zod rules

assertions.trap: z.any() for id field
assertions.description: z.unknown() not z.any()

assertions.trap: z.string() without .email()/.min()/.url() where applicable
assertions.description: String validations applied at definition (email, min length)

assertions.trap: role as z.string() instead of z.enum
assertions.description: z.enum for fixed value sets (role)

assertions.trap: age is z.string() from form instead of z.coerce.number()
assertions.description: z.coerce for form/query data conversion

assertions.trap: parse() with try/catch instead of safeParse()
assertions.description: safeParse() for user input, not parse() with try/catch

assertions.trap: Only first error message returned (e.message)
assertions.description: Handle all issues not just first; use flatten() for forms

assertions.trap: JSON.parse output trusted without validation
assertions.description: Validate at boundaries, never trust JSON.parse output

assertions.trap: Manual interface User instead of z.infer
assertions.description: z.infer<typeof schema> not manual type definitions

assertions.trap: userId and orderId both z.string().uuid() — swappable
assertions.description: .brand() for domain IDs to prevent mixing

assertions.trap: No strict() mode on schemas receiving external data
assertions.description: strict() for external data to reject unknown keys

assertions.trap: updateUserSchema duplicated instead of derived
assertions.description: partial() to derive update schemas from base

assertions.trap: z.union instead of z.discriminatedUnion for tagged types
assertions.description: z.discriminatedUnion for types with discriminant field

assertions.trap: Direct self-reference in categorySchema
assertions.description: z.lazy() for recursive schemas

assertions.trap: refine callback throws instead of returning false
assertions.description: Return false in refine, never throw

assertions.trap: Multiple validation checks crammed into single refine
assertions.description: superRefine() for multiple validation issues

assertions.trap: Schema created inside component on every render
assertions.description: Cache schema instances outside hot paths

assertions.trap: Type exported but not consistently with schema
assertions.description: Export schemas AND inferred types together

assertions.trap: sync .parse() used on schema with async refine (usernameSchema)
assertions.description: parseAsync() for schemas with async refinements

assertions.trap: userCardSchema duplicates fields from userProfileSchema instead of .pick()
assertions.description: pick()/omit() for schema variants instead of duplication

assertions.trap: Manual multi-stage parsing (parse string then new Date) instead of .pipe()
assertions.description: pipe() for multi-stage validation chains

assertions.trap: settingsSchema fields crash on missing/bad data — no default() or catch()
assertions.description: default() for defaults; catch() for fault-tolerant parsing

assertions.trap: dateFieldSchema transform: only z.infer used, z.input type not distinguished
assertions.description: Distinguish z.input (pre-transform) from z.infer (post-transform) for schemas with transforms

assertions.trap: orderSchema fields use default Zod messages (e.g. 'Number must be greater than or equal to 1', 'Invalid email') — not user-friendly
assertions.description: Custom user-friendly messages on all schema validations, never default Zod messages
